form.label: Alerts Investigation
form.description: Drill into systems, alert types, and raw events.

search.query: `l7_alerts` | stats count by Environment | sort Environment
`l7_alerts` | `l7_env_filter($tok_env$)` | stats count by System | sort System

`l7_alerts` | `l7_env_filter($tok_env$)` | where ("$tok_alert_type$"="*" OR Alert_Type="$tok_alert_type$") | where ("$tok_severity$"="*" OR Severity="$tok_severity$") | where match(System, "^(" . if("$tok_system$"="", ".*", "$tok_system$") . ")$") | eval Alert_Name=coalesce(Alert_Name, Event_Name) | stats count by Alert_Name | sort Alert_Name

`l7_alerts` | `l7_env_filter($tok_env$)` | where ("$tok_alert_type$"="*" OR Alert_Type="$tok_alert_type$") | where ("$tok_severity$"="*" OR Severity="$tok_severity$") | where match(System, "^(" . if("$tok_system$"="", ".*", "$tok_system$") . ")$") | eval Alert_Name=coalesce(Alert_Name, Event_Name) | where match(Alert_Name, "^(" . if("$tok_alert_name$"="", ".*", "$tok_alert_name$") . ")$") | stats count by System System_Type | sort - count

`l7_alerts` | `l7_env_filter($tok_env$)` | where ("$tok_alert_type$"="*" OR Alert_Type="$tok_alert_type$") | where ("$tok_severity$"="*" OR Severity="$tok_severity$") | where match(System, "^(" . if("$tok_system$"="", ".*", "$tok_system$") . ")$") | eval Alert_Name=coalesce(Alert_Name, Event_Name) | where match(Alert_Name, "^(" . if("$tok_alert_name$"="", ".*", "$tok_alert_name$") . ")$") | stats count by Alert_Name Alert_Type PriorityNum | sort - count | rename PriorityNum as Priority

`l7_alerts` | `l7_env_filter($tok_env$)` | where ("$tok_alert_type$"="*" OR Alert_Type="$tok_alert_type$") | where ("$tok_severity$"="*" OR Severity="$tok_severity$") | where match(System, "^(" . if("$tok_system$"="", ".*", "$tok_system$") . ")$") | eval Alert_Name=coalesce(Alert_Name, Event_Name) | where match(Alert_Name, "^(" . if("$tok_alert_name$"="", ".*", "$tok_alert_name$") . ")$") | eval TIME=strftime(_time,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | eval ENVIRONMENT=Environment | eval Client=coalesce(Client, mvindex(split(mvindex(split(_raw,"CLIENT:"),1),"/"),0), "-") | eval Source_IP=coalesce(Source_IP, mvindex(split(mvindex(split(_raw,"SOURCE_IP:"),1),"/"),0), "-") | eval Target_IP=coalesce(Target_IP, mvindex(split(mvindex(split(_raw,"TARGET_IP:"),1),"/"),0), "-") | eval Alert_Description=coalesce(Alert_Description, replace(Alert_Details,"\s+(Source:|Event:).*$","")) | eval Alert_Description=trim(Alert_Description) | sort - _time | table TIME ENVIRONMENT System Client System_Type Alert_Type Severity PriorityNum Alert_Name Source_IP Target_IP Alert_Description | rename PriorityNum as Priority

`l7_alerts` | `l7_env_filter($tok_env$)` | where System="$selected_system$" | where Alert_Type="$selected_alert_type$" | where Alert_Name="$selected_alert_name$" | eval PriorityNum=tonumber(Priority) | where PriorityNum=tonumber("$selected_priority$") | sort - _time | head 1 | eval DETAIL_RAW=coalesce(_raw, Alert_Details) | table DETAIL_RAW
